prompt: Rank from newest to oldest landmark

items.name: Burj Khalifa
items.fact: Completed 2010 — tallest building in the world

items.name: Machu Picchu
items.fact: ~1450 AD — Inca citadel abandoned ~100 years later

items.name: Great Pyramid of Giza
items.fact: ~2560 BC — oldest of the Seven Wonders, still standing
